nasb.text: All who are native shall do these things in this manner, in presenting an offering by fire, as a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: Every native Israelite shall do these things in this way, in offering a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 本地人獻馨香的火祭給耶和華，都要這樣辦理。

ccb.text: 凡以色列人献上蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭时，都要这样办理。
